currentState.summary: R101 PARADIGM SHIFT — Root cause found: agent answers questions instead of building relationships. TONE→RELATIONSHIP→AGENCY framework (Oded). Failure taxonomy: 32% timeout, 11% canned, 11% wrong_mode. Gold traces scored 9.2/10. 4 bug fixes committed. Process rules created.

blueprintPhase: RELATIONSHIP-FIRST REWRITE — Fix infra, rewrite purpose, teach profiling-through-conversation

rootCauseDiagnosis.currentLevel: TONE solved (5.9). RELATIONSHIP is the gap.
rootCauseDiagnosis.agentPurpose: Must change from 'answer questions' to 'build relationships, gather intel for human host team, customize through curiosity'
odedFeedback: Every turn is a missed profiling opportunity
Generic suggestions without asking preferences first
Rushing to suggestions instead of learning about guest

nextSteps.description: Fix infra: timeout 60s→90s, canned closer, crisis exit, Spanish crisis
Rewrite ALL specialist system prompts with relationship-first purpose (answer + profiling question + customization + host bridge)
Design profiling question bank by context (first contact, group, dining, loss, returning)
Update gold traces + few-shots with profiling questions (per Oded feedback)
Create 10 longer eval scenarios (5-7 turns) testing relationship building
Re-eval 30 scenarios at 90s timeout, present 5 to Oded for host/chatbot verdict
